name: <ModelName>_setScalarParameter
title: <ModelName>_setScalarParameter
description: Sets a scalar model parameter to the given value.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Model parameter. You can find the index of the model parameter in the file <ModelName>_M.csv which is located in the destination directory of the code generation, i.e the target directory of the model DLL.

description: The parameterization functions are deprecated. It is much easier to use the generated System variables directly.

Some parameters might not be configurable during measurement. This depends on the implementation of a Simulink block. If the <ModelName>_set functions are used in the preStart section of a CAPL program, all parameters will be configurable and will use the new values during measurement.
Parameterization requires the C-API for data exchange which is available since MATLAB R14.
